items.title: Americans stuck in the Middle East recount finding their way home with little government help
items.description: Stranded Americans across the Middle East say they’ve been left to navigate flight cancellations and confusing government guidance on their own

items.title: Retail sales fall modestly in January as American consumers pull back on spending
items.description: American consumers pulled back their spending to start 2026, extending the slump in retail sales that began late last year

items.title: German media group Axel Springer will buy the publisher of UK's Daily Telegraph for $766 million
items.description: German media group Axel Springer has agreed to buy the owner of Britain’s Daily Telegraph in a deal worth $766 million
